scripts.release: ssh sabendino@s1.ruphine.com "cd webapps/game-cryptarithm && unzip dist.zip && rm -rf public dist.zip && mv dist public "
scripts.git-tag: git tag v$npm_package_version && git push origin v$npm_package_version
scripts.publish: npm run build && npm run zip-build && npm run upload && npm run release && npm run delete-zip-build && npm run git-tag
scripts.git-tag-windows: git tag v%npm_package_version% && git push origin v%npm_package_version%
scripts.publish-windows: npm run build && npm run zip-build && npm run upload && npm run release && npm run delete-zip-build && npm run git-tag-windows
